items.title: Why Visa Stock Got Clocked Today
items.description: The fees the company relies on might come under threat from rapidly advancing technology, according to a new analysis.

items.title: Stock Market Today, Feb. 23: Nvidia Earnings Loom as Tariff Concerns Drive Dow 800 Points Lower
items.description: AI jitters, tariff shock, and looming Nvidia results have investors fleeing growth for perceived safety, today, Feb. 23, 2026.

items.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Sinks As EU Makes Trump Tariff Move; IBM Dives On This AI Threat (Live Coverage)
items.description: Indexes, including the Dow Jones industrials, dived on the stock market today. The EU made a Trump tariff move. Novo stock slid but gold plays shined.

items.title: Visa (V) Balances Innovation with Market Expectations
items.description: Visa Inc. (NYSE:V) is one of Goldman Sachs’s top growth stock picks. On February 10, Truist Securities analyst Matthew Coad cut the firm’s price target on Visa, Inc. (NYSE:V) to $372 from $374, while keeping a Buy rating on the stock. The target adjustment was part of a broader research update in which Truist revised […]

items.title: A Viral Blog Post Slams Stocks. Fear About AI Is Real.
items.description: The Substack post envisions an economy in 2028 in which AI has triggered mass layoffs and disrupted large-cap stocks like DoorDash and Uber.
